name: exchange_server
explanation: Exchange Server inherits the Windows perf_counters template (PerfCountersBaseCheckWithLegacySupport). In its default mode the Agent runs on the Exchange host itself and reads MSExchange* PDH performance counters locally; there is no remote host/port to probe. Auto-config reduces to 'is Exchange Server installed on this Windows host?' — a local service detection, not a network probe. The hidden pdh_legacy template adds remote host + credentials, but it's an opt-in mode.
notes: Pattern H (local Windows host detection), same shape as iis and active_directory. No auto_conf.yaml ships.
